EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Firewall rule "{object.id}" is added to the firewall configuration on host {event_src.host}
The "{object.value}" flag is set for firewall rule "{object.id}" on host {event_src.host}
Firewall rule "{object.id}" is enabled on host {event_src.host}
Firewall rule "{object.id}" is disabled on host {event_src.host}
